query: SELECT q.id, q.clientId, c.name as clientName, q.createdAt, COUNT(p.id) as projectCount FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id LEFT JOIN projects p ON q.id = p.quotationId GROUP BY q.id HAVING projectCount = 0 OR c.name LIKE '%Test%' OR c.name LIKE '%test%' OR c.name LIKE '%Prueba%' OR c.name LIKE '%prueba%' LIMIT 50;
